questions: How do bare-name collisions corrupt attribution?
Which resolution rule maximizes true-positive retention?

findings.summary: last-write-wins dict + bare-name call matching (lines 15-53); coin-toss under collisions
live collisions check/scan benign only by arity accident; the consumer _emit case shows the failure
multimap + three-tier resolution (same-file > tree-unique > skip-ambiguous) dominates same-file-only
